title: blechnum campylotis
intro: Blechnum campylotis, also known as the slender chain fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Blechnum campylotis is often used in infusions, poultices, and salves to promote healing and relieve symptoms.
